title: iberis aurosica subsp. aurosica
intro: Iberis aurosica subsp. aurosica, also known as Yellow Rocket or Winter's Candytuft, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Iberis aurosica subsp. aurosica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
